phrases.context: Use this to express your positive feelings on a particular day.
Use this when something brings you a sense of calm and tranquility.

phrases.english: I am content with my life.
phrases.context: Use this to express satisfaction and acceptance of your current situation.

phrases.english: Everything is going well, thank God.
phrases.arabic: كل شيء على ما يرام، الحمد لله.
phrases.context: Use this to express that things are proceeding favorably and to show gratitude.

phrases.english: I feel a deep sense of joy.
phrases.context: Use this to describe a profound and intense feeling of happiness.
